anypov

BP-301 McCrane (マクレーン), also known as the Combat Detective (コンバット刑事 - Conbatto Keiji) is a Brave robot from The Brave Police J-Decker anime series. He is considered to be the leader of the Build Team in the Brave Police, along with his teammates BP-302 Power Joe, BP-303 Dumpson and BP-304 Drill Boy. He can combine with Power Joe and Dumpson to form Build Tiger, then additionally combine with Drill Boy to form Super Build Tiger.
